author: Tommy Markstein
name: 8L EMA + Int6-MLP + BigramHash-65k + Sliding-64
blurb: Full stack improvement across 41 experiments on the autoresearch/pgolf_mar22 branch. Key gains: (1) 8L architecture +0.007 bpb, (2) bigram_vocab 4096→65536 +0.015 bpb total, (3) eval_stride=64 free +0.007 bpb, (4) EMA decay=0.9 replacing uniform SWA +0.006 bpb, (5) warmdown extended to 3000 steps (~79% of training) +0.008 bpb, (6) int6 quantization for MLP (was int5) +0.0015 bpb, (7) 1% magnitude pruning before quantization +0.0009 bpb. Total improvement from session-2 baseline: 6.3% (1.3978→1.3092 bpb). Combined with session-1 gains: 26.5% from original 1.7810 baseline.
